name: James Burgess
title: PADI Open Water Scuba Instructor & EFR Instructor

contact.availability: Flexible — trade instruction for boat time and tank refills

profile: 1,000+ logged dives across the Cape Atlantic, Lake Malawi, Thailand, Greece, the Galapagos, Sodwana Bay, the Red Sea, the Great Barrier Reef, and Kenya. Cold water roots, warm water heart.

PADI Open Water Scuba Instructor and Emergency First Response Instructor. Trained at Ocean Tribe Kenya (2024). Teaching approach shaped by 14 years in engineering leadership — calm, clinical, patient.
Special love for Discover Scuba Dives — being the first person to show someone what breathing underwater feels like. Gentle with newbies, obsessed with nudibranchs, always staring at the floor.
leadership: Former A-Level Computer Science teacher — natural instructor across domains
Clinical, calm approach to diver training; makes nervous students feel genuinely comfortable
Experienced leading teams of 6–8 in high-stakes regulated environments — risk management is instinct
Integrates marine awareness naturally into every interaction, not as a lecture
IE training at Ocean Tribe Kenya included supporting local Kenyan instructors in developing their teaching skills
